title: React's findDOMNode should be avoided
description: React's "findDOMNode" should not be usedAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityreliabilityCode SmellreactWhy is this an issue?More InfoIn React,findDOMNodeis used to get the browser DOM node given a component instance. However, usingfindDOMNodeis fragile because the connection between the JSX node and the code manipulating the corresponding DOM node is not explicit. For example, changing the external structure of returned JSX will affect the return value offindDOMNode.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.
